title: SendFrameNotificationsResponse
description: Neynar Farcaster API schema for SendFrameNotificationsResponse

campaign_id.description: The unique identifier for the notification campaign.

failure_count.description: The number of notifications that failed to deliver.

not_attempted_count.description: The number of notifications not attempted (e.g., disabled tokens, invalid tokens).

retryable_fids.description: List of FIDs that failed due to retryable errors (rate_limited, failed, http_error). Can be used to retry sending notifications to these users.

success_count.description: The number of notifications successfully delivered.
